text.title: BA Methodologies Detail Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the methodologies-detail methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale and is referenced from `content/06-decision-tree.xml`.

rule.statement: Step 1 (classify ask): Determine which of the 12 frameworks the ask requires.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the classify ask gate.

rule.statement: Step 2 (select frameworks): Lock the framework set; document why each.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the select frameworks gate.

rule.statement: Step 3 (emit deliverables): Generate template skeletons; assign owners + due.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the emit deliverables gate.

rule.statement: Step 4 (fill and review): Per-framework SME fills; peer review against checklist.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the fill and review gate.

rule.statement: Step 5 (publish): Commit to version control; link from KA routing record.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the publish gate.

rule.statement: If preconditions for methodologies-detail do not hold, do not apply this methodology; route to an alternative as the decision tree suggests.
rule.rationale: Methodologies misapplied to wrong contexts create overhead without value; explicit skip preserves the agent's budget.
